name: Plane Integration
title: Plane PMS Native Integration
description: Knowledge about Plane Project Management System integration using the Plane MCP server and automated professional solution reporting.

axiomAlignment.A1_verifiability: MCP tool calls provide verifiable access via the official Plane API.
axiomAlignment.A3_transparency: Jinja2 templates ensure transparent and consistent HTML payload generation.
axiomAlignment.A5_evolutionary_design: Skill-based reporting evolves with project branding and orchestration standards.

mcp_access.description: Standardised Plane access via Plane MCP server
best_practices: Always resolve metadata (labels, cycles, states) before creating work items.

professional_reporting.description: Automated solution reporting for issue closure
best_practices: Align aesthetics with the 'beautiful' task creation style.
Include summary, files affected, and verification proof.
Prefer MCP tools over direct ORM access for standard operations.
Always provide a professional solution summary when moving issues to DONE.
Maintain visual consistency across all Plane interactions.
anti_patterns: Closing issues without a formatted solution comment.
Hardcoding UUIDs in task definitions; use dynamic resolution instead.
Exceeding the visual standards established in the 'beautiful' templates.
